name: ChipInput
description: Multi-value input with removable ChipRegular tokens, optional autocomplete listbox, free-text entry, and label/hint/error feedback. Combines input-field and dropdown patterns for multi-select.

props.name: options
props.description: Available options — when provided, behaves as multi-select autocomplete.

props.name: values
props.description: Currently selected values (option values when using options, or free-text strings).

props.name: allowFreeText
props.description: Allow creating values not in options list (via Enter key). Defaults to true when no options provided.

props.name: error
props.description: Error message — puts the field in error state.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the input and all chips.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class for the root element. Layout composition only — do NOT use for custom styling.

props.name: id
props.description: ID for the input element. Auto-generated if not provided.

states.rationale: ChipInput box hover changes border color only — no background OKLCH shift or overlay on the main surface. Same input-family token-swap pattern. Chips inside use their own ChipRegular state treatment.

keyboard.ArrowDown: Open listbox or move highlight down
keyboard.Enter: Select highlighted option or add free-text chip
keyboard.Backspace: Remove last chip when input is empty

accessibility.focusManagement: natural tab order; arrow keys within listbox

propertyMapping.note: Visual-only Figma property. In code, states come from CSS pseudo-classes and data attributes (data-error, data-disabled, data-open, data-has-chips).
Figma boolean. In code, empty state is derived from values.length === 0.
Figma text shows typed search text. In code, managed by internal search state.
Direct mapping. Default 'Type...' in both Figma and code.
Figma boolean. In code, error is a string — truthy = error state + message.
Figma errorText content maps to the React error string prop value.
Figma booleans tag1/tag2/tag3 toggle individual chips. In code, chips are driven by the values array.

useWhen: Multi-value selection from a predefined list (tags, categories, assignees)
Free-text token entry with removable chips
doNotUseFor: Single-value selection — use Dropdown or DropdownAutocomplete
Rich text input — use a rich text editor

knownDeviations.description: Figma 'chips' component does not include label, hint, or listbox rows. In code, ChipInput renders label, field box with chips + input, optional listbox, and hint/error as a single component.
Figma uses boolean toggles (tag1, tag2, tag3) for up to 3 chips. In code, chips are driven by a dynamic values array with unlimited entries and wrapping.
